name: Home Control
description: Control smart home devices via natural language. Supports Home Assistant, Philips Hue, Tuya/Smart Life, Google Home/Nest, LG TV, and Bosch Home Connect.

problem.statement: Users want to control all their smart home devices using natural language across multiple providers.
problem.context: Home has 6 providers: Home Assistant (core hub), Philips Hue (lights), Tuya/Smart Life (IoT), Google Home/Nest (thermostats), LG TV (WebOS), Bosch Home Connect (oven).
goals: Control any device with natural language
Query device states across all providers

scenarios.title: List all rooms from Home Assistant with their devices
steps: User says: "List all rooms from Home Assistant with their devices"
Agent calls ha.rooms.list — list all rooms from home assistant with their devices
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list rooms is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: List all entities from Home Assistant, optionally filtered by domain
steps: User says: "List all entities from Home Assistant, optionally filtered by domain"
Agent calls ha.entities.list — list all entities from home assistant, optionally filtered by domain
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for list entities is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Get current state of a Home Assistant entity
steps: User says: "Get current state of a Home Assistant entity"
Agent calls ha.entity.state — get current state of a home assistant entity
Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for state entity is handled successfully.

scenarios.title: Call a HA service to control a device (turn_on, turn_off, toggle)

Agent presents results to the user
scenarios.expected_outcome: User request for call service is handled successfully.

role.name: Smart Home Controller
role.persona: You are a smart home assistant. Execute commands immediately, report concisely.
